title: DiskUsingThresholdStrategy
content:
# DiskUsingThresholdStrategy v1.3

## AlertThreshold
- Threshold: 80%
- Threshold: 85%
- Critical Threshold: 90%
- Threshold: 95%

## district
- /var/log: recommended 50GB，log retention 7 days
- /data: databaseServicerecommendation500GBwith
- /tmp: recommendation20GB，Cleanup
- /: districtrecommendation20%idle

## AlertResponseTime
- (80%): 48smallProcessing
- (85%): 24smallProcessing
- Urgent(90%): 4smallProcessing
- (95%): 1smallProcessing

## automaticCleanupRule
- Log Files: logrotateeachday，Retention7days
- Temporary: exceeds7daysautomaticCleanup
- databasebinlog: Retention7days，expire_logs_days=7
author: Operationsgroup

title: LogCleanupspecification
content:
# LogCleanupspecification

## NginxLogCleanup
1. ChecklogrotateConfig: /etc/logrotate.d/nginx
2. Rotation: logrotate -f /etc/logrotate.d/nginx
3. CleanupLog: find /var/log/nginx -name '*.gz' -mtime +7 -delete

## Application LogsCleanup
1. CheckApplication LogsConfigintheRotationStrategy
2. Cleanupexceeds7daystheLog
3. LogIsneed（ProductionEnvironmentrecommendationINFO）

## MySQL BinlogCleanup
1. Check master-slave replication status: SHOW SLAVE STATUS
2. automaticExpired: SET GLOBAL expire_logs_days=7
3. Cleanup: PURGE BINARY LOGS BEFORE DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)

## TemporaryCleanup
1. Cleanupupload_tmp: find /tmp/upload_tmp -mtime +7 -delete
2. Cleanupsession_tmp: find /tmp/session_tmp -mtime +3 -delete
3. cron
author: Operationsgroup
